steps.title: Compute distance for each activity
steps.content: Distance equals speed multiplied by time. Walking distance: $$3 \text{ mph} \times w \text{ h} = 3w$$ miles. Running distance: $$5 \text{ mph} \times r \text{ h} = 5r$$ miles.

steps.title: Set total distance equal to 14 miles
steps.content: The combined distance is the sum: $$3w + 5r = 14$$ miles. This matches choice A — A is correct.
